long_description:
Made with 100% whole grain oats and honey, Nature Valley Crunchy Oats & Honey Granola bars are the perfect on-the-go sWe believe in the power of nature. It can inspire the get-up-and-go in each of us, and means we're able to make stuff that tastes really good too. So whether it's busy mornings or just needing a little pick-me-up, let the great taste of our ingredients give you everything to take it on the Nature Valley way.

Packed with whole grain oats and honey, Nature Valley CRUNCHY OATS & HONEY bars are the perfect on-the-go snack, there for you whenever you need it most. Nature's pretty generous too, that's why we've packed our packs with two delicious bars to make the most of your day.

  • 100% whole grain oats

  • No artificial colours or preservatives

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Lactose free

LCMs Kaleidos are a sure-fire lunchbox hit with a great chocolatey taste! Also great as an afternoon pantry snack, afterschool treat, or for grabbing on-the-go!

Try our write-on wrappers. 

Say it with LCMs!

One of life's little JOYs
  • Made with Kellogg's Rice Bubbles

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • Sure-fire lunchbox hit!

  • Contains 5 individually wrapped LCMs bars

name: Original Mix
description: BHUJA ORIGINAL MIX 150G
long_description:
Discover the unique and exciting flavours of our Bhuja Original Mix. This delightful blend features aromatic spices, crunchy nibbles, garden peas, peanuts, and juicy sultanas. Perfect for picnics, party platters, or adding an extra crunch to your lunch, our mix is the better, more interesting snack choice.

At Bhuja, we believe that snacks should spice things up! Our bold moves, adventurous flavor combinations, and unexpected textures make every munching and crunching moment exciting and eye-opening.

Why Choose Bhuja Original Mix?
• Vegan & Vegetarian Friendly: Enjoy a snack that aligns with your dietary preferences.
• Certified Gluten-Free: Safe for those with gluten sensitivities.
• No Artificial Colours, Flavours, or Preservatives: Only real spices and wholesome ingredients.
• 5g Protein Per Serving: A nutritious option to keep you energised.

name: Snack Mix Salted Cashew Nuts Share Pack
description: NOBBYS NUTS CASHEWS SALTED 250G
long_description:
Carefully Salted For Pleasure
Your favourite seasoned nuts are available in one packet with Nobby's Snack Mix Salted Cashew Nuts Share Pack 250g. Carefully salted cashews make up this party mix, ready to be popped open and shared at any communal event. When you're looking for salty lunch snacks or a treat while on the go, remember Nobby's snacks.

Fire Up These Footy Finals
Get fired up these Footy Finals by laying out a spread for friends that includes Nobby's assorted nuts. These salted cashews come in a share pack that integrates well with other mixed snacks, providing an easy snacking option to bite into between cheers for your favourite team. Your mates will always love the end of the footy season when they know you'll be sharing the snacking experience of Nobby's salted cashew nuts.

Take Snack Magic Outdoors
Snack time shouldn't be restricted to sharing indoors on the couch or in the kitchen. Take the magic of Nobby's assorted nuts outdoors on your next adventure. Whether you're on the go all day on a hike, or just spending the afternoon relaxing at a picnic, the addition of a salted nuts share pack will be more than welcomed. Heighten the magic of an outdoor adventure by including salted cashews in your day.
  • Nobby's Snack Mix Salted Cashew Nuts Share Pack 250g provides a party mix of cashews that'll mix up your everyday routine. Enjoy salted nuts anytime you feel the need to begin sharing your snacking goods with others. The perfect addition to a snack mix spread come Footy Finals season. Ready to be packed up for on-the-go or kept within reach for careful snacking on the couch.

name: Cracker Mix
description: BHUJA CRACKERS MIX 150G
long_description:
Bhuja Cracker Mix - Fragrant and Flavourful

Discover the unique and exciting flavours of our Bhuja Cracker Mix. This delightful blend features fragrant and flavourful spices that contrast with a delicious mix of wholesome crunchy nibbles, rice crackers, garden peas, peanuts, chickpeas, and succulent raisins. Perfect for sharing with the world, this mix is a must-have for your snacking moments.

At Bhuja, we believe in spicing things up. We make bold moves, embrace adventure, and dare to explore unexpected flavor and texture combinations that make every munching moment eye-opening and exciting. So, buckle up and try our wildly delicious take on savory snacking that'll make your taste buds do a double-take.

Why Choose Bhuja Cracker Mix?

  1. 6g Protein Per Serving: A nutritious option to keep you energised.
  2. Certified Gluten-Free: Safe for those with gluten sensitivities.
  3. No Artificial Colours, Flavours, or Preservatives: Only real spices and wholesome ingredients.
  4. Suitable for Vegetarians: Perfect for those following a vegetarian diet.
  5. Vegan Friendly: Ideal for those following a plant-based lifestyle.
  6. Made in Australia: Proudly supporting local businesses.

Browse our delicious range of vegan and gluten-free mixes, and you’ll see why the magic’s in the mix. Mix It Up® with Bhuja!

name: Pre-peeled Peanuts Party Bag Salted
description: NOBBYS NUTS PEANUTS SALTED
long_description:
Fun For All Footy Fans
Start the Footy Finals experience right with Nobby's Peanuts Salted 375g, the undisputed champions of beer nuts. As a trusted companion for game day festivities, these peanuts bring an extra layer of excitement to the cheering crowds packed into your living room. With the perfect balance of saltiness, they're the ideal crunch to share alongside your mate's favourite mixed snacks and beverages. The fun never stops with Nobby's.

Crunch into Celebration
Make every gathering memorable with a party bag of nuts-the perfect party snack for any occasion. Whether it's a casual get-together, a birthday bash, or a festive celebration, these peanuts add a dash of flair and familiarity to the party spread. Their simple goodness and nostalgic flavouring appeal to all snacking tastes, ensuring that your guests leave with a lingering impression of the perfect, crunchy party treat.

Pre-Peeled Perfection For Convenience
For those on the go, Nobby's assorted snack of peanuts offers a convenient and satisfying solution. Pre-peeled and ready to enjoy, these peanuts are the ultimate snack for those busy days. Toss them in your bag, take them on your commute, and relish the unbeatable taste of salted peanuts wherever your journey takes you; work break, midnight snack, in the middle of sports, the possibilities are endless!
  • Nobby's Peanuts Salted 375g is a party bag of epic proportions, ready to deal out a savoury snack for all to nibble on. Pre-peeled for convenient snacking while on the go. Friends will be impressed by how much they love this classic party snack. Whether you need something fun on the work break or while watching the footy finals, Nobby's snacks have got you covered.

Lightly Popped, Boldly Flavoured

PopCorners are air-popped to deliver the perfect crunch, without the greasy feel of traditional chips. The Sweet & Salty variety offers a delightful mix of flavours that's light in texture, yet indulgently satisfying.

Gluten-Free Snacking

These popcorn chips are gluten-free, ensuring that everyone can enjoy a tasty snack without compromise, no matter their dietary needs.

Sharing Made Easy

This 130g share pack is perfect for casual snacking at home, whether you're enjoying a movie night with friends or adding a fun snack to your weekend get-togethers.

  • Air-popped for a perfectly crisp popcorn chip.

  • Pop open a share pack at your next picnic, movie night or weekend hang-out.

  • No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives.

  • A gluten-free snack that everyone can enjoy.

name: Baked Pretzels Wheat Original

long_description:
Ideal as School Lunch Snacks or Work Break Snacks
The Parker's Baked Wheat Original Pretzels are a delicious and convenient baked snack for adults and kids alike - great for a work break, delightful treat and school lunchbox snack. Whether you're by yourself, looking after the kids, or entertaining guests, make Parker's Pretzels your go-to favourite crunchy, salty snack.

The Feel Good Snacking Alternative
The finest ingredients are used in Parker's Pretzels, and we pride ourselves on our baked, not fried process. Our tasty snacks are also low in saturated fat, with no added MSG. So if you find yourself constantly reaching for the bag while watching entertainment, grab a packet of Parker's for a wholesome snacking experience.
  • Parker's Baked Pretzels, oven-baked savoury delights with our signature pretzel crunch.

  • No artificial colours or flavours means they're suitable for everyone.

  • Our deliciously crunchy pretzels are baked not fried and contain no added MSG.

  • Low in saturated fat, they're the perfect wholesome snack to keep next to you on the couch while you enjoy your entertainment.

  • Great for a work break treat and as school lunchbox snacks.

name: Beef Jerky Original
description: JACK LINKS BEEF JERKY ORIGINAL VALUE PACK 150G
long_description:
At Jack Link's, we've been crafting quality meat snacks for generations. Our Original Beef Jerky is made from with 100% premium grass-fed beef, seasoned to perfection, then slow-cooked and naturally smoked over wood to create a deep, rich flavour with just the right balance of smoky and savoury notes.
With 17g of protein per serving, it's the ultimate high-protein snack to keep you fuelled—whether you're on the go, at work, or simply kicking back and unwinding.
Made from 100% grass-fed beef
High in protein - 17g per serving
Marinated and slow-cooked for a deep, rich flavour
Naturally wood-smoked for bold, savoury taste
No artificial preservatives
Ready-to-eat, anytime snack
For those who crave big flavour and real satisfaction, Jack Link's Original Beef Jerky delivers every time. Feed Your Wild Side.
  • Good source of Protein

  • Premium Grass-Fed Beef

name: Bbq Beef Jerky
description: JACK LINKS BBQ BEEF JERKY 50G
long_description: If there's one things Australians love, it's a quick BBQ (more commonly known as a “barbie” in everyday parlance), but we know that there's something special about slow-cooking and smoking beef that really brings the best out the meat. Lazy buggers rejoice! Jack Link's BBQ beef jerky flavour does all the hard work for you. You can buy a pack, sit back and savour the deep flavours of our slow cooked beef jerky with added smoky flavours, courtesy of Jack Link's, Australia's best beef jerky brand.

name: Beef Jerky Teriyaki Soy Ginger & Garlic
description: BYRON BEEF JERKY 120G:TERIYAKI SOY GINGER AND GARLIC:.:120 GRAM
long_description:
Deep, savoury, and perfectly balanced, Byron Beef Jerky Teriyaki Flavour delivers rich umami in every bite. Marinated in a classic blend of soy, ginger, and garlic, this 120g pack offers a bold yet refined jerky experience with subtle sweetness and aromatic warmth. Crafted from premium Australian beef and air-dried to lock in flavour, it's a low-carb, high-protein snack made for those who appreciate depth and authenticity.

Why Choose Air-Dried Jerky?
Byron Beef Jerky is naturally better, here's why:

Nutrient Retention: Our gentle air-drying process preserves essential vitamins, minerals, and proteins without harsh heat.

No Artificial Preservatives: Just clean, honest ingredients???no nasties, ever.

Rich and Layered Flavour: Removing moisture intensifies the beefs essence, enhancing the bold smokiness and caramel finish.

Sustained Energy: With 20g of raw, naturally air-dried beef protein per pack, it's built to fuel your day.

On-the-Go Convenience: Lightweight and easy to carry, it's your ideal companion for road trips, hikes, workouts, or desk-side snacking.

Our Story Founded in 2011 in the Byron Bay hinterland, Byron Beef Jerky is the brainchild of locals Graham and Melissa. With a passion for clean eating and bold flavours, they pioneered air-dried jerky in Australia. Drawing on traditional drying techniques from Grahams family and a love for rich, adventurous taste profiles, they crafted jerky that doesn't compromise on quality or flavour.

Still made in Byrons hinterland using specially sourced, grass-fed beef, Byron Beef Jerky is committed to sustainability, integrity, and great taste. Teriyaki Flavour showcases the brands dedication to deep, authentic flavour???balancing Soy, Ginger and Garlic for a true taste sensation.
ingredients: Australian Grass Fed Beef 91%, Spice Mix (Australian Coriander Seed, Murray River Pink Salt, Beef Stock, Black Pepper), Teriyaki Marinade 3%, Tamari 2%, Garlic Powder 2%, Worcestershire Sauce, Vinegar.
allergens:
Contains Sesame, Soy
Free From Gluten

Baked & Wholesome Treats Ready For Entertaining
Parker's Baked Mini Pretzels are not your average snacks, making them the elevated treats sure to entertain guests of all ages. Our golden-brown glazed pretzels minis will satisfy anyone's taste buds with the salty crunch that we all know and love.
What's more, our 225g party bag is perfect entertaining size to pass around on any occasion, allowing you and your loved ones to enjoy a wholesome snack together.

Lots Of Fun In Every Lunch Box
Treat yourself to the crunchy goodness of Parker's Mini Pretzels, a delectable snack that delivers big flavour in small, perfectly portioned bites. Whether you're looking to include a delicious treat for school lunch boxes or curb your mid-day cravings at work, simply divvy these lunch snacks into delicious portions. Grab a bag of Parker's Baked Mini Pretzels today, and your taste buds will not be disappointed.
  • What's not to love? It's a wholesome and classic snack adored by everyone.

  • Parker's Baked Pretzels have 50% less sodium (compared to Parker's Original Salted Baked Pretzels).

  • Just as delicious and wholesome with no added MSG.

  • Tasty treats to include in lunch boxes or during the work break.

  • Our 225g party bag is ideal for sharing with friends and family.

Original but not ordinary! Delightfully aromatic spices play against a marvellous mix of wholesome crunchy nibbles, garden peas, peanuts and juicy sultanas in our classic Bhuja Original Mix. The better, more interesting snack choice for your next picnic or party platter, or even add it to your lunch for that extra crunch!

We believe a snack should spice things up! Bold moves. Adventurous flavour combinations. Unexpected textures. These are the things that make your munching, crunching moments exciting and eye-opening. Look more closely at our delicious vegan and gluten free mixes using real spices and wholesome ingredients, and you'll see why the magic's in the mix.

- Vegan & vegetarian friendly
- Certified gluten free
- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives
- 5g protein per serving
- Australian owned and made

name: Organic Stick Beef Sea Salt
description: KOOEE! ORGANIC STICK BEEF 25G:SEA SALT:.:25 GRAM
long_description:
Introducing KOOEE! Natural Snack Sticks, Australia's first healthy meat stick. 

Our Sea Salt flavoured Beef Sticks are a crowd-pleaser for the whole family. They're a mildly-seasoned, easy to chew snack stick that allows the taste of the amazing beef we use to shine through. 

Throw our Sticks in your child's lunchbox as an everyday snack they'll love, take them to work as a high-protein snack on the go, or let our Sticks fuel your adventures outdoors.

Our Beef Sticks are made with 100% Australian Organic, Grass-fed Beef and no mystery meat.

Our Sticks are gluten-free, soy-free and dairy-free, and are all made without the added nasties you'll find in every other salami stick on the market. And they're super low in sugar, with only 0.2g of sugar in every stick. They're also keto and paleo-friendly. 
  • 100% Australian Organic Grass-fed Beef

  • Less than 1g Sugar

  • 7g Protein

  • Only Natural Ingredients

  • Gluten Free

long_description:
Take Savoury Goodness with You Wherever You Go
Nobby's bacon bites come in 40g pouches of savoury goodness so you can take them with you on the go! They're the ideal size to slip right into a backpack or handbag for snacking on your work break or commute. Even better, you can sprinkle them on top of your favourite lunch for that crispy, mouthwatering bacon flavour in every bite.

Delicious Variety for All Your Entertaining Needs
Our Crispy Bacon Flavoured Bites are the ideal crowd-pleaser to complete your assorted snack mix at your next gathering or party. Even suitable for vegetarians, these smoky and savoury bites will be sure to delight plenty of guests.

Add the Missing Nibbles to Your Next Movie Night
Nobby's crispy bacon bites are the ideal couch companion for your next movie marathon. Pair your entertainment with Nobby's to scratch that lip-smacking bacon-flavoured itch. Go on Nibble on with Nobby's.
  • Nobby's Crispy Bacon Flavoured Bites deliver a burst of mouthwatering savoury flavour in every bite.

  • Nobby's assorted snacks have been loved by Australians far and wide for over 70 years!

  • These crispy bacon bites come in perfectly sized 40g pouches, so you can take them with you on the go!

  • Ideal for adding variety to the snack bowl at your next party or gathering.

  • Keep Nobby's bacon bites at arm's length on the couch and Nibble on

name: Ultimate Laundry Liquid Detergent Sensitive 40 Washes
description: OMO ULTIMATE LAUNDRY LIQUID SENSITIVE 2 LITRE
long_description:
OMO Ultimate Sensitive Laundry Liquid Front & Top Loader is tough on stains but gentle on skin. Not only is it dermatologically tested, but it's also fragrance free, making it perfect for sensitive skin. Plus, it's powerful, attacking ultra-tough stains first time thanks to naturally derived stain removers and biodegradable enzymes.

At OMO, we believe in delivering amazing stain removal in the most sustainable way possible. That's why these washing liquid bottles are recyclable and made from 50% recycled plastic. What's more, this bottle contains 10% more liquid.*

Our liquid laundry detergent is recommended by leading machine manufacturers and suitable for all washing machine types (both front and top loader). For great results, simply add 50 ml of the liquid detergent to a normal load, 1 cap for a large load or heavy soil, and 1/3 cap per 5 L of water for handwashing or soaking. Always follow the care label on clothes.

OMO believes that real change happens when we roll up our sleeves and get dirty. We all want a cleaner future for our world. That's why OMO is changing. We're delivering a clean you can trust in the most sustainable way we can. Visit the OMO website to find out how we're getting dirty for a cleaner future and how you can join us too. Get dirty for good.

*Compared to OMO Ultimate Sensitive 1.8 L

  • Recommended by leading washing machine manufacturers and suitable for both front and top loader machines

  • These detergent bottles are made from 50% recycled plastic and are recyclable

OMO Expert Wonder Wash Odour Refresh Laundry Liquid is specially designed to work wonders in quick and cold cycles, achieving an effective clean in just 15 minutes! Thanks to our unique Pro-S technology, this laundry detergent blasts away sweaty odours, leaving your clothes wonderfully fresh. Suitable for activewear that needs a quick refresh, our washing liquid is boosted with extra odour-fighting ingredients to ensure your clothes smell amazing every time. Pro-S technology stands for Pro-Speed, Pro-Scent and Pro-Smell. This fast-acting formulation has proven efficacy on stain removal, delivering freshness and removing sweaty odours in 15 minutes. OMO Expert Wonder Wash Laundry Liquid is suitable for all colours and washing machine types (both front and top loader). For great results, add 48ml to your machine. This liquid detergent has been formulated to work in quick and cold wash cycles, but will work at any temperature. Always follow the care label on your clothes.

Dynamo Professional Deep Clean 7 in 1 laundry detergent - Laundry liquid with 7 actions in 1 for superior stain removal

Dynamo Professional Deep Clean 7 in 1 is the ultimate washing liquid, delivering seven powerful actions in one wash. With its advanced enzyme formula, Dynamo provides a deep clean and superior stain removal, making it suitable for all types of laundry. This laundry detergent works not only as a machine detergent but also as a hand washing clothes detergent, ensuring a thorough clean for delicate items.

Choose Dynamo for a powerful, versatile clean that's gentle on fabrics while effectively eliminating tough stains. For a superior clean that protects your fabrics, trust Dynamo Professional Deep Clean 7 in 1. Whether you're washing uniforms, delicates, or everyday garments, this detergent ensures spotless, fresh laundry every time. Dynamo liquid bottles are made from 75% Australian recycled plastic. The product is greywater- and septic-safe and contains 92% biodegradable ingredients.
  • Deep clean: Dynamo Professional Deep Clean 7 in 1 washing liquid effectively penetrates fabrics to remove embedded dirt and grime, ensuring hygienic results

  • Tough stain removal: Designed to tackle even the most stubborn stains first time, this clothes washing liquid is ideal for heavily soiled items

  • Clean and fresh scent: Enjoy a refreshing scent and odour removal with every wash thanks to this laundry liquid detergent, leaving your laundry smelling delightful and revitalised

  • How to use: For best results on heavy, dried-in stains, simply fill the cap, rub a little onto the stain, and throw the rest of the washing machine detergent into the drum

long_description:

At OMO, we believe in delivering amazing stain removal in the most sustainable way possible. That's why these washing liquid bottles are 100% recyclable and made from 50% recycled plastic. Not only that, but 94% of the ingredients* in this liquid laundry detergent are also biodegradable.

Our laundry detergent is suitable for all colours and washing machine types (both front and top loader) and is recommended by leading machine manufacturers. For great results, add 50 ml of the liquid detergent to a normal load, 1 cap for a large load or heavy soil, and 1/3 cap per 5 L of water for handwashing or soaking. long_description:
Embrace the romance of Paris with our Parisian-inspired fabric conditioner. Featuring scent burst technology, Comfort Paris Fabric Conditioner provides 100 Days of Long Lasting Freshness. Infused with essential oils, its premium fragrance combines the timeless beauty of roses with the delicate allure of freesia and the sensual warmth of white musk, capturing the essence of Parisian elegance and sophistication. Suitable for all washing machine types, our fabric conditioner helps prevent fabric damage and extends the life of your clothes so you enjoy luxuriously scented and irresistibly soft laundry with every wash. How to use: Add a cap of Comfort to your machine's fabric conditioner dispensing unit for a full laundry load or ½ cap for handwashing. Wear gloves for handwashing, wash hands after use and do not pour the fabric conditioner directly onto fabrics. For an even more intense fragrance experience, pair this fabric conditioner with Comfort Paris In-Wash Scent Booster Beads. Indulge in the long-lasting fragrances of Comfort's Destinations range and say hello to fresh-smelling clothes that spark joy with every wear, transforming your laundry experience into a luxurious escape.

name: Ultimate Laundry Detergent Washing Powder 40 Washes
description: OMO ULTIMATE LAUNDRY POWDER 2KG
long_description:
OMO Ultimate Front & Top Loader Washing Powder attacks ultra tough stains, even mud, sweat and sauces. With naturally derived stain removers, bio-degradable enzymes, a compostable and bio-degradable eco-scoop, and a 100% recyclable carton, our best washing powder is also kinder to the planet.

OMO Ultimate Washing Powder is suitable for all washing machines - both front loader and top loader. For great results, use the recommended dosage, follow the care label on clothes and wash non-colourfast clothes separately. OMO has a full range of laundry products to suit every need, including OMO 3 in 1 capsules and OMO laundry liquid detergent. Use OMO Sensitive for a formula that is tough on stains and gentle on skin, OMO Active to attack stains first time or OMO Odour Eliminator to eliminate odours with Odour Defence Technology.

OMO believes that real change happens when we roll up our sleeves and get dirty. We all want a cleaner future for our world. That is why OMO is playing our part by delivering ultimate stain removal in the most sustainable way we can. Visit the OMO website to find out how we are getting dirty for a cleaner future, and how you can join us too. Get dirty for good.
  • OMO Ultimate Washing Powder Front & Top Loader attacks ultra tough stains, even mud, sweat and sauce

  • This washing powder is our best stain remover

  • Powered by naturally derived stain removers for laundry that is kinder to the planet

  • Our washing powder contains bio-degradable enzymes and is suitable for both front loader and top loader machines

  • Carton is 100% recyclable with a compostable and bio-degradable eco-scoop to make laundry more sustainable

  • OMO has won Reader's Digest's Most Trusted Laundry Brand nine years running - powering up the world's changemakers to get dirty for good.
ingredients: TO LIFT DIRT AND STAINS - Anionic and Nonionic Surfactants TO WHITEN AND BRIGHTEN - Optical Brighteners and Activated Oxygen Bleach TO BREAK DOWN AND REMOVE STAINS - Enzymes TO DISPERSE FATTY SOILS - Alkalis TO SUSPEND DIRT AND SOFTEN WATER - Sodium Carbonate and Sodium Sulphate, Sequestrant and Polymer TO CONTROL SUDS - Antifoam TO REMOVE ODOURS AND LEAVE LONG LASTING FRESHNESS - Perfume A small amount of Colour is included

name: Laundry Powder
description: EARTH CHOICE LAUNDRY POWDER 2KG
long_description:
Authentic 
For over 40 years, Earth Choice has pioneered green approaches to product, packaging and processes - setting the standard for the future of cleaning and leading the way in Australia.

Powerful 
Nature is powerful but it takes more than plants to make an Earth Choice product. Each formulation contains powerful active ingredients sourced from natural elements, rather than petrochemicals to create a powerful cleaning solution that's gentle on the earth.

Attainable
Tough on stains, gentle on the wallet Earth Choice believes in prioritising planet over profit, it exists to ensure Australians have access to natural cleaning solutions that don't harm the earth. Always meeting the needs of families, stocking where you shop, and selling at an affordable price.

Earth Choice Ultra Concentrate Laundry Powder.
Touch on stains, gentle on nature.

Sourced from nature
- Plant based formula.
- No petrochemical cleansers.
- Reduce chemical waste & pollution.
- Free from ammonia & chlorine.
- Biodegradable (Surfactants are readily biodegradable according to Australian Standard AS4351).

Grey water & septic safe
- Septic safe.
- Low sodium.

name: Stain Remover
description: MAGIC STAIN REMOVER 250ML
long_description:
Our Australian Made & Owned Magic Solvent-Power Stain Remover Spray is formulated to start working immediately to help prevent stains from becoming permanently set. Ideal for stains and marks made by: coffee, wine, food, blood, sauce and more. It can also be used on carpets, furniture and walls.

  • Bleach-free

  • Great on Everyday Stains

  • Works in Cold or Hot Washes

  • Septic and Grey Water Safe

Stains come in many forms; some are water-soluble, oily/greasy or dyes; therefore, there are different types of stain removers. Some are oxy-action, enzyme-based and others are solvent-based. Magic Solvent-Power Stain RemoverTM efficiently removes hundreds of spills, spots, and stains.

Our solvent-base stain remover that is ideal for:

REMOVING - Oil and grease, Pet and wildlife messes, Food and red wine, Blood and lipstick, Oil-based paint, Paint from brushes, Nail polish, Permanent marker and scuff marks, Graffiti, Marks on car paintwork and upholstery, Chewing gum, Sticky label residue and so much more!

FABRIC - Most fabrics (test on an inconspicuous area before use), Use on any surface that usually tolerates water, Works in cold or hot washes (use temperature to suit fabric), Carpet, Upholstery, Paintbrushes, Avoid use on fabrics that are not colour-fast

FEATURES - Powerful solvent stain remover, Laundering is not always essential, Septic & grey water safe, Non-toxic, biodegradable product, Spray on ready-to-use formula, then add water to activate


Stains can become permanently set if left to dry or washed without a pre-wash treatment. Stains should be treated as soon as possible and laundered while fresh. Tougher/old stains may need repeat treatments.

Handy Hint: Use Magic Oxy-Action Stain Remover Pen or Magic Solvent-Power Stain Remover Mini Spray for stains on the go. A convenient size for your handbag, briefcase, car, desk, and suitcase.

  • Bleach-free

  • Great on Everyday Stains

  • Works in Cold or Hot Washes

  • Septic and Grey Water Safe

name: 3 In 1 Laundry Capsules Sensitive
description: EARTHWISE 3 IN 1 LAUNDRY CAPSULES SENSITIVE 26PK
long_description:
EFFECTIVE NATURALLY
From our humble roots in a garden shed in Waikato, New Zealand, we have been refining our know-how to deliver naturally effective cleaning performance since 1967. Earthwise is a new range of laundry detergent products that give you the same great washing results as everyday household laundry brands.


Discover an uncompromising clean and wash the easy way with Earthwise Sensitive Laundry Detergent Capsules. Our sensitive laundry capsules are free from added nasties^ and are gentle on the skin and boosted with naturally derived stain removal fighting enzymes to deliver 3in1 powered cleaning action in every wash. Suitable for front and top loader washing machines, and cold water washing, our multi chamber, water soluble laundry detergent capsules are:
1. TOUGH ON STAINS
2. FRESH FRAGRANCE
3. FREE FROM NASTIES^
4. CRUELTY-FREE
5. VEGAN
6. GREYWATER & SEPTIC SAFE.

^No added Phosphates, Chlorinated Bleach, Ammonia and Optical Brighteners.
#Compared to Earthwise 2L Liquid.

Earthwise's new laundry range utilises the power of naturally derived enzymes to remove stains and is available in both Liquids and Capsules.
  • 3in1 POWERED CLEANING ACTION - Earthwise Sensitive Laundry Detergent Capsules are tough on stains boosted with naturally derived enzymes to deliver exceptional cleaning action in every wash

  • 45% LESS PLASTIC - With multi chamber, water soluble capsules that use 45% less plastic per washload# and are also vegan, cruelty-free and greywater & septic safe, Earthwise Laundry Detergent Capsules deliver naturally effective cleaning performance.

  • SUSTAINABLE BENEFITS - Earthwise Laundry Detergent Capsules are vegan, cruelty-free and greywater & septic safe to deliver naturally effective cleaning performance

  • FUSS-FREE CONVENIENT LAUNDRY CAPSULES - Discover an uncompromising clean and wash the easy way with Earthwise Laundry Detergent Capsules, suitable for Front and Top Loaders and cold washing.

  • SAME GREAT RESULTS AS EVERYDAY HOUSEHOLD BRANDS - Earthwise is a new range of cleaning products that deliver naturally effective cleaning performance since 1967 from our humble roots in New Zealand

Do not overload your machine. If ever your capsule leaves a little residue on your clothes, simply rinse under warm water. Do not use on silk or wool. Always follow the care label on your clothes.

name: Colour Catcher
description: SARD COLOUR CATCHER 22 PK
long_description:
Sard Colour Catcher Colour Protection Sheets

Your insurance for perfect laundry & colours!

Colour Catcher laundry sheets protect your clothes from colour run accidents, even caused by micro-bleeding thanks to colour protect technology. It preserves colour vibrancy and provides great results for all your laundry, no matter the wash cycle, fabric or temperature. Additionally, you can help your wallet, simplify your laundry routine by saving less time sorting for fewer washloads. No Colour Catcher = no wash!
And this is how the magic happens:
- During the wash, colours bleed into the water.
- The sheet catches and traps them safely so they don't transfer on the other clothes.
- The proof is on the sheet!
  • Avoids colour run accidents - Colour Catcher laundry sheets effectively trap colours that bleed into the water during the wash. The proof is on the sheet!

  • Colour protection - These colour protection sheets protect your clothes against dye transfer accidents, even caused by micro-bleeding.

  • Keeps colours vibrant - The Colour Catcher laundry sheets preserve colour vibrancy wash after wash thanks to its colour protect technology.

  • Great results for all laundry - Colour Catcher laundry sheet provides great results for all your laundry, no matter the wash cycle, fabric or temperature.

  • Each laundry sheet is made from 100% naturally-derived fibres. The sheet is also made of biodegradable fibres and is FSC certified. Packaging is made from 100% recycled paper and recyclable.

name: Deep Cleaner Disinfectant
description: MAGIC WASHING MACHINE DEEP CLEANER DISINFECTANT 250ML
long_description:
Over time, dirt, soil, grease, bacteria, biological waste, organic matter, hair and body fats from clothing, detergent scum, lint, and calcium deposits build up behind the bowl and inside the washing machine pipes. These hidden deposits harbour bacteria, causing unpleasant odours, clothing discolouration, dark flakes on clothes, and blockages, causing washing machine repairs.

Magic Washing Machine Deep Cleaner and Disinfectant:
  • Breaks down stubborn grime deposits, limescale, detergents and fabric softener.
  • Has been independently tested using EN1276 and has proven to kill bacteria such as S. aureus, E. coli, P. aeruginosa, E. hirae, and S. choleraesuis.
  • Removes odours.
  • Prolongs the life of your washing machine.
  • Is safe for septic & greywater systems.
  • Is cruelty-free.
  • Is suitable for top & front loaders.
  • Is Biodegradable and Non-Toxic.
  • Is Australian Made & Owned.
Handy Hint: Use Magic Washing Machine Deep Cleaner monthly as a maintenance clean. If your machine is used heavily or hasn't been cleaned for over 3-6 months, we recommend repeating the process and then running the machine through a high-water rinse cycle.

Fun Fact: Place the waste pipe into your sink and watch the grime wash from your machine to see the Magic in action.
  • Most Powerful Washing Machine Cleaner

  • Kills 99.99% of Germs

  • Eliminates Bad Odours

  • Removes Stubborn Limescale & Dirt

  • Australian Made & Owned

  • Suitable for Top & Front Loaders.
ingredients: CONTAINS: Active ingredient SULFAMIC ACID 40.3g/kg

description: CANESTEN ANTIBACTERIAL AND ANTIFUNGAL LAUNDRY LIQUID SANITISER 1L
long_description:
The fungi that can cause conditions like Fungal Nappy Rash and Thrush can find their way into your laundry. Washing, especially at cold temperatures may not completely remove the Bacteria and Fungi in your laundry, which can increase the risk of re-infection.
An infectious cycle can commence and cross-infect other family members when they come into contact with fabrics that still contain Bacteria and Fungi.
Adding Canesten Hygiene Laundry Rinse to each wash will deliver hygienically clean laundry, helping to break the cycle of cross-infection for yourself and other family members.

Key Features
- Eliminates Bacteria and Fungi from your washing.
- Ideal for towels, bed linen, underwear, baby clothes and sweaty sport clothes.
- Gentle on fabrics.
- Eliminates 99.9% germs.
- Helps prevent cross-infections.
- Helps protect the whole family.
- Delivers hygienically clean laundry.

name: Light Laundry Scent Booster Beads White Lavender
description: DOWNY LIGHT LAUNDRY SCENT BOOSTER BEADS WHITE LAVENDER 379G
long_description:
Finally, long-lasting scent that is not overpowering. Downy Light Laundry Scent Booster Beads are lightly scented laundry beads that give you all-day Downy freshness. They're made with no heavy perfumes, dyes, or phosphates. The White Lavender formula has the lightweight comforting scent of freshly picked lavender blooms softened with hints of smooth, creamy vanilla, your clothes will smell delightful without overpowering your senses. With detergent alone, the freshness of your clothes can fade after taking them out of the wash. Using Downy laundry scent booster beads gives your laundry long-lasting freshness, so you can be confident in fresh-smelling clothes all day long without being overpowered by too much scent. Downy Fabric Beads can be used on all colors and fabrics and are safe to use in all washing machines. These laundry scent beads are easy to use; just start by tossing them right into the washer drum before adding your clothing. Use as much or as little as you want to get your desired level of freshness. Use with Downy Liquid Fabric Enhancer Liquid, for added freshness and softness to your favourite clothes.
  • LIGHT SCENT: In-wash scent beads that provide a light boost of scent, made with no heavy perfumes, no dyes, and no phosphates

  • ALL-DAY, LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Downy Scent Booster delivers longer-lasting freshness* *vs detergent alone

  • EASY TO USE: Just toss these gentle, lightly scented laundry scent booster beads into your washer before adding fabrics

  • SAFE FOR ALL LOADS: Downy Light Fabric Scent Beads can be used on all colors and fabrics, and are safe enough to use in all washing machines

  • WHITE LAVENDER: Enjoy the light, comforting scent of freshly picked lavender blooms softened with hints of smooth, creamy vanilla

  • Includes one 13.4 OZ bottle of Downy Light Laundry Scent Booster Beads in White Lavender scent.
ingredients: PEG (Perfume Carrier), Fragrances, Methyl Di-t-butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate (Odor Blocker)

name: Tahiti Dreams Scent Booster Beads Frangipani Papaya & Guava

long_description:
Transport yourself to an island oasis with our Tahitian-inspired laundry scent booster. Suitable for all fabrics, Comfort Tahiti In-Wash Scent Booster Beads envelop your clothes in 100 Days of Long Lasting Freshness with every wash. Infused with essential oils, this enchanting and premium fragrance blends the juicy sweetness of papaya with the subtle tartness of guava wrapped in delicate frangipani blossoms, transforming every wash into a fragrant escape to paradise that will have you leaving a trail of irresistible fragrance everywhere you go. Suitable for all washing machine types, our 98% biodegradable and sugar-cane-derived in-wash scent booster bead formula dissolves fast without leaving any residue on clothes. How to use: Pour a cap of Comfort In-Wash Scent Booster Beads directly into the washing machine drum. Add more or less depending on the fragrance intensity you desire. Do not place the scent booster beads in the dispensing drawer. For machine wash only. Wash clothes as usual with laundry detergent and Comfort Tahiti Fabric Conditioner to keep clothes looking, feeling and smelling fresh for longer. Indulge in the long-lasting fragrances of Comfort's Destinations range and say hello to fresh-smelling clothes that spark joy with every wear, transforming your laundry experience into a luxurious escape.

  • Every wash envelops your clothes in the exotic allure of Tahiti.

long_description:
Did you know that traditional toilet cleaner cages can harbour germs? Duck Fresh Discs have a gel-based formula that self-sticks to the toilet bowl so germy cages aren't something to fret about.

Duck Fresh Discs prevent the build up of limescale and stains that harbour germs. Just stick it to the inside rim of the toilet bowl to keep things clean. Pretty easy, huh?

Your favourite since 1968, the Original Superwipe rinses hygienically clean.  It's our best rinsing and drying Superwipe for a fast clean*. Built to rapidly absorb spills and to clean with sprays, the Original Superwipe has been made with specialised Chux Hydro Weave technology, so they effectively remove dust, grease & grime in a flash.  
In a convenient ‘tear off' roll ready to be easily dispensed. They are also non-scratch so safe to use on most household surfaces, leaving behind a sparkling surface and a smile. 
 

  • Hydro Weave technology effectively removes dust, grease, and grime. 
  • Quality fibres for rapid absorption. 
  • Non-scratch cares for your surfaces. 
  • Our best rinsing and drying superwipe*!

name: Eco Antibacterial Multipurpose Disinfectant Wipes Fresh Lemon
description: AJAX ECO MULTIPURPOSE WIPES FRESH LEMON 110PK
long_description:
Relax... Ajax lets you clean with confidence.

Feel good knowing these wipes clean most household surfaces. Feel proud using biodegradable wipes, sourced responsibly. Feel powerful with antibacterial disinfectant wipes that kill 99.9% of germs.

Multipurpose Wipes - use us to clean:
The Kitchen: Benchtops, stovetops, sinks, rubbish bins.
The Bathroom: Toilets, toilet seats, floor, baths, taps, basins.
Other surfaces: Tables, desks, phones, door handles, high chairs.

FOUR EASY STEPS
1. Pop open the lid, peel back the sticker and pull our wipe through.
2. Simply wipe your surfaces until they're clean.
3. If you want to disinfect (non-porous) surfaces, wipe them until they are thoroughly wet, then let it sit for 10 minutes They're so easy to use, there's no need to dilute them or rinse.
4. Once you're done, please dispose of our wipe thoughtfully! Do not flush them down the toilet - our planet will thank you!

Always read the label. Follow the directions for use.

Pack Size: 110 Wipes, Fresh Lemon Scent.

  • ANTIBACTERIAL DISINFECTANT SURFACE CLEANING WIPES: A household grade disinfectant wipe that kills 99.9 percent of germs and cuts through grease, grime and stains

  • MULTIPURPOSE WIPES MAKE CLEANING A BREEZE: Suitable for use in the kitchen, bathroom and other surfaces

  • BIODEGRADABLE WIPES: Made from biodegradable fibres (excludes packaging), sourced responsibly.

  • FRESH FRAGRANCE AND SHINE: Our wipes can be used on a variety of hard surfaces around the home leaving a fresh lemon scent and shine

  • PACK SIZE: 110 Multi-purpose surface cleaning wipes
ingredients: Didecyldimethylammonium Chloride 0.36% W/W
